reason: Multiple dedicated MCP servers exist for Zendesk. Notable community implementations include: mattcoatsworth/zendesk-mcp-server (feature-complete with tickets, users, macros support), @fruggr/zendesk-mcp-server (OAuth-focused with two-way Help Center integration), and Sajiiidddd/zendesk-mcp (60+ tools). These allow AI clients like Claude Desktop to interact with Zendesk via MCP. Additionally, Zendesk offers an official early-access program for native MCP server integration through Admin Center.
